Name: Uses backoffice
Documentation: Editors use the backoffice application service.

Name: Reads delivery
Documentation: Public visitors use the delivery application service.

Name: Serves admin
Documentation: FastAPI routes expose the backoffice service.

Name: Runs routes
Documentation: The FastAPI process contains the ArcHub router.

Name: Uses CMS service
Documentation: Routes delegate content operations to the CMS service.

Documentation: Routes delegate block preview audit and render operations to the builder service.

Documentation: Ports provide host adapters for routes and services.

Documentation: Routes render packaged templates and static assets.

Name: Exports snapshots
Documentation: Runtime helpers write published runtime snapshots.
